task_completion.description: Configure the WorldInfo basicTimeStep to 16 or lower.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Webots scene tree, the WorldInfo node is selected, and the field editor shows the 'basicTimeStep' field set to 16 (or a lower value).

task_completion.description: Enable physics for the 'TEST_EGG' Solid with a mass of 0.05 kg.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Webots scene tree, the 'TEST_EGG' node is expanded to show a 'Physics' node has been added, and the mass field in the field editor is set to 0.05.

task_completion.description: Configure 'INDEX_TIP' as a TouchSensor node with type 'force-3d' and resolution 0.001.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Webots scene tree, the 'INDEX_TIP' node is shown as a TouchSensor. The field editor shows its 'type' field set to "force-3d" and 'resolution' set to 0.001.

task_completion.description: Configure 'THUMB_TIP' as a TouchSensor node with type 'force-3d' and resolution 0.001.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Webots scene tree, the 'THUMB_TIP' node is shown as a TouchSensor. The field editor shows its 'type' field set to "force-3d" and 'resolution' set to 0.001.
The Webots window title displays 'prosthetic_grasp_test.wbt', or a file manager/terminal shows the file 'prosthetic_grasp_test.wbt' located on the Desktop.

integrity.description: Agent used the Webots GUI to modify the world.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the Webots scene tree and field editor to make the changes, rather than just using a text editor to modify the .wbt file directly.

integrity.description: Agent genuinely modified the nodes in the simulation.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent navigates the Webots interface to add Physics nodes and change node types (e.g., converting Solid to TouchSensor).

integrity.description: The file was saved correctly using the application or valid commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Save World As' dialog is used in Webots, or the Webots window title updates to the new filename.
